name: BAIC BluePark New Energy Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: BAIC BluePark New Energy Technology Co.,Ltd. provides smart travel solutions in China and internationally. The company offers intelligent networked electric vehicles, charging and replacing services, and time-sharing leasing services, as well as vehicle maintenance and repair, and life-cycle butler services. BAIC BluePark New Energy Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2009 and is based in Beijing, China.
